title: անիւ
definition: wheel; circular form of sun/moon; round toy; spherical head.

title: անշեղ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian նշեղ (nšeł, “straight, direct”) with privative prefix ան-.

title: անպէտ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian պէտ (pet, “need, necessity”) with privative prefix ան-.

title: անսալ
definition: to listen, to obey, to heed, to forgive, to endure.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian անսամ (ansam, “to listen, to obey”).

title: ապշիլ
definition: to be surprised, amazed, astonished, stupefied.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ապշեմ (apšem, “to be amazed, to be stupefied”).

title: առկայ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian առ (ar, “at, to”) + կայ (kay, “exists”).

title: արդէն
new_etymology: From Old Armenian արդ (ard, “now”) + են (en, “they are”).

title: աւիշ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian աւիշ (awiš, “juice, sap, lymph”).

title: աւիւն
new_etymology: From Old Armenian աւիւն (awiwn, “fury, spirit, enthusiasm”).

title: բաւել
new_etymology: From Old Armenian բաւեմ (bawem, “to suffice, to be enough”).

title: բեւեռ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian բեւեռ (bewerr, “pole, nail, spike”).

title: բիւրօ
new_etymology: Borrowed from French bureau (“office, desk, bureau”).

title: բխիլ
definition: to spring, to stream, to arise, to flow, to proceed.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian բխիմ (bxim, “to spring, to gush”).

title: բնաւ
definition: not at all, never, in no wise.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian բնաւ (bnaw, “never, not at all”).

title: գիտակ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian գիտեմ (gitem, “to know”) + -ակ (-ak, “one who”).

title: գոյժ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian գոյժ (goyž, “lamentation, sad news”).

title: գոնէ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: գոցել
definition: to shut, to close, to enclose, to lock.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian գոցեմ (gocem, “to close, to shut”).

title: դաւել
definition: to plot, to scheme, to conspire.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian դաւեմ (davem, “to plot, to conspire”).

title: դիզել
definition: to heap up, to pile, to accumulate.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian դիզեմ (dizem, “to heap, to pile up”).

title: դռոյթ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: ելոյթ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ել (el, “to go out”) + -ոյթ (-oytʿ, “abstract noun suffix”).

title: երեւի
new_etymology: From Old Armenian երեւիմ (erevim, “to appear, to seem”).

title: երէց
definition: elder, eldest, senior, grand, pastor, priest.

title: եւս
definition: also, more, moreover, besides, still, anew.

title: եփիլ
definition: to boil, to cook, to become edible.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian եփեմ (epʿem, “to boil, to cook”).

title: էապէս
new_etymology: From Old Armenian է (ē, “is, to be”) + -ապէս (-apēs, “-ly, adverbial suffix”).

title: թառիլ
definition: to perch, to roost, to sit.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թառիմ (tʿarrim, “to perch, to roost”).

title: թափիլ
definition: to pour out, to flow, to spill, to drop, to fall.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թափեմ (tʿapʿem, “to pour, to spill”).

title: թուել
definition: to count, to number, to calculate, to reckon.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թուեմ (tʿuwem, “to count, to reckon”).

title: թուիլ
definition: to seem, to look, to appear, to sound.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թուիմ (tʿuwim, “to seem, to appear”).

title: իբրեւ
definition: as, like, such as, nearly, rather.

title: իրաւ
definition: really, truly, justly, rightly, real, true, just.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian իրաւ (iraw, “just, true, real”).

title: լուալ
definition: to wash, to bathe, to rinse, to launder, to shame, to rebuke.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian լուամ (luam, “to wash, to bathe”).

title: լպիրշ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: լսելի
new_etymology: From Old Armenian լսեմ (lsem, “to hear”) + -ելի (-eli, “able to”).

title: խիւս
definition: paste, pap, pulp, poultice, gruel, starch.

title: խմբել
definition: to form a group, to gather, to celebrate.

title: ծագիլ
definition: to shine, to dawn, to begin, to appear, to rise, to emanate.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ծագիմ (cagim, “to rise, to appear”).

title: ծակել
definition: to bore, to perforate, to pierce, to puncture, to drill.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ծակեմ (cakem, “to pierce, to bore”).

title: ծնիլ
definition: to give birth, to be born.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ծնիմ (cʿnim, “to be born”).

title: ծոյլ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: ծորիլ
definition: to trickle, to flow, to leak, to drip, to stream.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ծորիմ (corim, “to flow, to trickle”).

title: կեղեւ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կեղեւ (keġew, “bark, rind, shell”).

title: կլլել
definition: to swallow, to gulp, to chug, to endure.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կլլեմ (klllem, “to swallow, to gulp”).

title: կոփել
definition: to sculpt, to cut, to carve, to hew.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կոփեմ (kopʿem, “to sculpt, to carve”).
